name: function 1
data to send
query:
from(bucket: "SmartClass")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classroom")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "led" or
      r._field == "projector" or
      r._field == "ac"
  )
  |> last()

name: function 2
Schedule
query:
from(bucket: "SmartClass")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "classroom_schedule")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Monday")
  |> last()

name: Parse AC Control
MQTT Status
Status function
UI Buttons
format:
<style>
/* 1. THE ICON BACKGROUND BOX */
  /* Target the Vuetify button element directly */
  .massive-switch .v-btn {
      height: 60px !important;
      width: 60px !important;
      border-radius: 6px !important;
      
      /* Default OFF Background (Industrial Red) */
      background-color: #d32f2f !important; 
      
      /* Force the actual icon graphic to be perfectly white */
      color: #FFFFFF !important; 
      
      box-shadow: 0px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
      transition: background-color 0.3s ease !important;
      
      /* Reset layout margins to ensure it centers nicely */
      margin: 0 !important;
  }

  /* 2. THE "ON" STATE STYLING */
  /* FlowFuse Dashboard 2.0 applies color classes to the button based on your node settings.
     Assuming you set the "On Colour" to green in the node properties, we target .text-green 
     to trigger the background color shift. */
  .massive-switch .v-btn.text-green {
      background-color: #388e3c !important; /* ON Background (Industrial Green) */
  }

  /* 3. THE ICON GRAPHIC SIZE */
  .massive-switch .v-btn .v-icon {
      font-size: 35px !important;
  }

  /* 4. CLEAN UP VUETIFY HOVER EFFECTS */
  /* Vuetify adds grey circles when you click or hover. This deletes them to keep the HMI looking like hardware. */
  .massive-switch .v-btn__overlay,
  .massive-switch .v-btn__underlay {
      display: none !important;
  }

  /* 5. THE TEXT LABEL */
  .massive-switch .v-label {
      font-size: 30px !important;
      color: #FFFFFF !important;
      opacity: 1 !important;
      line-height: 60px !important;
      padding-left: 15px !important; /* Adds a gap between the new icon box and the text */
      flex: none !important;
  }

/* 1. THE MAIN BUTTON BOX */
  .massive-switch2 .nrdb-switch {
      display: flex !important;
      align-items: center !important;
      justify-content: center !important;
      gap: 12px !important;
      
      /* THIS IS CRITICAL FOR THE HIT-BOX */
      position: relative !important; 
      
      height: 60px !important;
      width: 100% !important;
      
      background-color: #d32f2f !important; 
      border-radius: 8px !important;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important;
      
      margin: 0 auto !important;
      padding: 0 15px !important;
      cursor: pointer !important;
      transition: background-color 0.2s ease-in-out !important;
  }

  /* 2. DETECTING THE "ON" STATE */
  .massive-switch2 .nrdb-switch:has(.text-green) {
      background-color: #388e3c !important; 
  }

  /* 3. THE TEXT LABEL */
  .massive-switch2 .v-label {
      color: #FFFFFF !important;
      font-size: 22px !important;
      opacity: 1 !important;
      flex: none !important; 
      pointer-events: none !important;
  }
  /* 4. THE ICON BUTTON, HIT-BOX & ANTI-RIPPLE */
  
  /* The physical button properties */
  .massive-switch2 .v-btn {
      color: #FFFFFF !important; 
      width: auto !important;
      height: auto !important;
      overflow: visible !important; 
      position: static !important; 
      
      /* Strips the blue/grey browser tap focus */
      outline: none !important;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent !important;
  }

  /* The Stretched Hit-Box */
  .massive-switch2 .v-btn::after {
      content: "" !important;
      position: absolute !important;
      inset: 0 !important; 
      z-index: 99 !important; 
      cursor: pointer !important;
  }

  /* Target and destroy the injected ripple element */
  .massive-switch2 .v-btn .v-ripple__container {
      display: none !important;
  }

  .massive-switch2 .v-btn .v-icon {
      font-size: 32px !important;
  }
  /* 5. CLEANUP VUETIFY ARTIFACTS */
  .massive-switch2 .v-btn__overlay,
  .massive-switch2 .v-btn__underlay {
      display: none !important;
  }
</style>
